documentation.description:
Copyright 2022 (C) Marc Poulhiès
This file has been adapted for the STM32F0 (ARM Cortex M4)
Beware that most of this has been reused from Ada Drivers Library
(https://github.com/AdaCore/Ada_Drivers_Library) and has been
tested (as of this writing) in only one very restricted scenario.

simple_types.name: Timer
simple_types.code: type Timer is limited private;

simple_types.name: Timer_14_Remapping_Options
simple_types.code: type Timer_14_Remapping_Options is (TIM14_GPIO, TIM14_HSE, TIM14_MCO);

simple_types.name: Timer_Break_Polarity
simple_types.code: type Timer_Break_Polarity is (Low, High);

simple_types.name: Timer_Capture_Compare_Modes
simple_types.code: type Timer_Capture_Compare_Modes is (Output, Direct_TI, Indirect_TI, TRC);

simple_types.name: Timer_Capture_Compare_State
simple_types.code: type Timer_Capture_Compare_State is (Disable, Enable);

simple_types.name: Timer_Channel
simple_types.code: type Timer_Channel is (Channel_1, Channel_2, Channel_3, Channel_4);

simple_types.name: Timer_Clock_Divisor
simple_types.code: type Timer_Clock_Divisor is (Div1, Div2, Div4);

simple_types.name: Timer_Counter_Alignment_Mode
simple_types.code:
type Timer_Counter_Alignment_Mode is
  (Up, Down, Center_Aligned1, Center_Aligned2, Center_Aligned3);

documentation.description:
We combine the up-down direction and the center-aligned mode selection
into a single type because the two are interdependent and we don't want
the user to have to remember to set the direction when not using one
of the center-aligned choices. The discontiguous binary values used to
represent the enumerals reflect the combination of the adjacent fields
within the timer representation.

simple_types.name: Timer_DMA_Base_Address
simple_types.code:
type Timer_DMA_Base_Address is
  (DMA_Base_CR1, DMA_Base_CR2, DMA_Base_SMCR, DMA_Base_DIER, DMA_Base_SR,
   DMA_Base_EGR, DMA_Base_CCMR1, DMA_Base_CCMR2, …,
   DMA_Base_OR);

simple_types.name: Timer_DMA_Burst_Length
simple_types.code:
type Timer_DMA_Burst_Length is
  (DMA_Burst_Length_1, DMA_Burst_Length_2, DMA_Burst_Length_3,
   DMA_Burst_Length_4, DMA_Burst_Length_5, DMA_Burst_Length_6,
   DMA_Burst_Length_7, DMA_Burst_Length_8, …, DMA_Burst_Length_18);

simple_types.name: Timer_DMA_Source
Timer_Event_Source
simple_types.code:
type Timer_Event_Source is
  (Event_Source_Update, Event_Source_CC1, Event_Source_CC2,
   Event_Source_CC3, Event_Source_CC4, Event_Source_COM,
   Event_Source_Trigger, Event_Source_Break);

simple_types.name: Timer_External_Trigger_Filter
simple_types.code: type Timer_External_Trigger_Filter is mod 16;

simple_types.name: Timer_External_Trigger_Polarity
simple_types.code: type Timer_External_Trigger_Polarity is (Inverted, Noninverted);

simple_types.name: Timer_External_Trigger_Prescaler
simple_types.code: type Timer_External_Trigger_Prescaler is (Off, Div2, Div4, Div8);

simple_types.name: Timer_Input_Capture_Filter
simple_types.code: type Timer_Input_Capture_Filter is mod 16;

simple_types.name: Timer_Input_Capture_Polarity
simple_types.code: type Timer_Input_Capture_Polarity is (Rising, Falling, Both_Edges);

simple_types.name: Timer_Input_Capture_Prescaler
simple_types.code:
type Timer_Input_Capture_Prescaler is
  (Div1,
   Div2,
   Div4,
   Div8);

enumeration_literals.name: Div1
enumeration_literals.description: Capture performed each time an edge is detected on input

simple_types.name: Timer_Interrupt
simple_types.code:
type Timer_Interrupt is
  (Timer_Update_Interrupt, Timer_CC1_Interrupt, Timer_CC2_Interrupt,
   Timer_CC3_Interrupt, Timer_CC4_Interrupt, Timer_COM_Interrupt,
   Timer_Trigger_Interrupt, Timer_Break_Interrupt);

simple_types.name: Timer_Lock_Level
simple_types.code: type Timer_Lock_Level is (Off, Level_1, Level_2, Level_3);

simple_types.name: Timer_One_Pulse_Mode
simple_types.code: type Timer_One_Pulse_Mode is (Repetitive, Single);

simple_types.name: Timer_Output_Compare_And_PWM_Mode

documentation.description: See RM pg 560 for the effects of these values

simple_types.name: Timer_Output_Compare_Polarity
simple_types.code: type Timer_Output_Compare_Polarity is (High, Low);

simple_types.name: Timer_Prescaler_Reload_Mode
simple_types.code: type Timer_Prescaler_Reload_Mode is (Update, Immediate);

simple_types.name: Timer_Slave_Mode
simple_types.code:
type Timer_Slave_Mode is
  (Disabled,
   Encoder_Mode_TI1,
   Encoder_Mode_TI2,
   Encoder_Mode_TI1_TI2,
   Reset, Gated, Trigger, External_1);

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: counter counts up/down on TI1 edge

enumeration_literals.name: Encoder_Mode_TI1
enumeration_literals.description: counter counts up/down on TI2 edge

enumeration_literals.name: Encoder_Mode_TI2
enumeration_literals.description: counter counts up/down on both TI1 & TI2 edges

simple_types.name: Timer_Status_Flag
simple_types.code:
type Timer_Status_Flag is
  (Timer_Update_Indicated, Timer_CC1_Indicated, Timer_CC2_Indicated,
   Timer_CC3_Indicated, Timer_CC4_Indicated, Timer_COM_Indicated,
   Timer_Trigger_Indicated, Timer_Break_Indicated, …, Timer_CC4OF_Indicated);

simple_types.name: Timer_Trigger_Input_Source
simple_types.code:
type Timer_Trigger_Input_Source is
  (Internal_Trigger_0,
   Internal_Trigger_1,
   Internal_Trigger_2,
   Internal_Trigger_3,
   TI1_Edge_Detector,
   Filtered_Timer_Input_1,
   Filtered_Timer_Input_2,
   External_Trigger_Input);

simple_types.name: Timer_Trigger_Output_Source
simple_types.code:
type Timer_Trigger_Output_Source is
  (Reset, Enable, Update, OC1, OC1Ref, OC2Ref, OC3Ref, OC4Ref);

simple_types.name: Timer_Update_Source
simple_types.code: type Timer_Update_Source is (Global, Regular);

array_types.name: Timer_Interrupt_List
array_types.code: type Timer_Interrupt_List is array (Positive range <>) of Timer_Interrupt;

subtypes.name: Timer_Encoder_Mode
subtypes.code:
subtype Timer_Encoder_Mode is
  Timer_Slave_Mode range Encoder_Mode_TI1 .. Encoder_Mode_TI1_TI2;

subtypes.name: Timer_External_Clock_Source
Timer_Input_Capture_Selection
subtypes.code:
subtype Timer_Input_Capture_Selection is
  Timer_Capture_Compare_Modes range Direct_TI .. TRC;

subtypes.name: Timer_Internal_Trigger_Source
subtypes.code:
subtype Timer_Internal_Trigger_Source is
  Timer_Trigger_Input_Source range Internal_Trigger_0 .. Internal_Trigger_3;

documentation.description:
Raised when accessing a given channel configuration with the wrong view:
as an input when it is set to be an output, and vice versa

documentation.description:
Reading the upper reserved area of the CCR register does no harm when
the timer does not support 32-bit CC registers so we do not protect
this function with a precondition.

subprograms.name: Current_Counter
subprograms.code: function Current_Counter (This : Timer) return UInt32

documentation.description:
For those timers that actually have a 32-bit counter this function will
return the full word value. For the other timers, the upper half-word of
the result will be all zeros so in effect the result will be a half-word
value.

This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM2_Base or
This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM3_Base or
This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM4_Base or
This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM5_Base or
This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM8_Base
--  all the above can be with any of the four channels
or
(This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM9_Base and
 Channel in Channel_1 | Channel_2)
or
(This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM10_Base and
 Channel = Channel_1)
or
(This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM11_Base and
 Channel = Channel_1)
or
(This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM12_Base and
 Channel in Channel_1 | Channel_2)
or
(This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM13_Base and
 Channel = Channel_1)
or
(This'Address = STM32_SVD.TIM14_Base and
 Channel = Channel_1));
